name: Request Engine
description: Service request intake, validation, draft/submission lifecycle, request metadata, requester context, service requirements, channel handling, tenant boundaries and request-to-booking handoff.

name: Matching Engine
description: Provider eligibility, ranking, availability checks, capability matching, proximity signals, fairness controls, re-ranking, matching explanations and assignment candidate generation.

name: Booking, Assignment & Service Activation Engine
description: Booking lifecycle, provider assignment, acceptance semantics, scheduling, activation rules, reassignment, cancellation request handoff, conflict handling and booking-state governance.

name: Service Execution Engine
description: Service delivery lifecycle, check-in/check-out, execution evidence, task progress, completion, on-site events, service notes, exception handling and execution auditability.

name: Financial Operations Engine
description: Ledger, wallet, payments, commissions, invoices, settlements, refunds, adjustments, payout governance, reconciliation, financial audit and accounting-safe transaction modeling.

name: Trust, Compliance & Governance Engine
description: Trust controls, verification governance, policy enforcement, complaints, disputes, appeals, fraud signals, compliance evidence, moderation workflows and platform risk governance.

name: Business Roles & Platform Structure Engine
description: Platform ownership model, operating teams, provider organizations, company operators, independent providers, customer-side trusted contacts, role relationships and organization-level boundaries.

name: Identity, Roles, Profiles & Access Engine
description: Identity, authentication, user profiles, role assignment, permissions, company affiliation, provider/customer profile lifecycle, access boundaries and identity audit.

name: Search, Discovery & Filtering Engine
description: Marketplace discovery, keyword search, structured filters, facets, sorting, availability filters, geo-aware discovery hooks, ranking integration, search permissions and tenant-scoped indexing.

name: Geospatial, Maps & Location Engine
description: Addresses, coordinates, geocoding, reverse geocoding, distance matrix, routes, ETA, geofencing, service areas, location validation, live location privacy and map-provider abstraction.

name: Incentives, Referrals, Promotions & Commission Policy Engine
description: Referral programs, campaigns, incentives, promotions, reduced commissions, eligibility rules, reward lifecycle, fraud prevention, settlement integration and policy-versioned growth governance.

name: Communication & Notification Engine
description: Email, SMS, push, voice, chat, in-app inbox, templates, preferences, routing, retries, compliance and delivery governance.

name: Document, Media & File Management Engine
description: Secure file ingestion, metadata, versions, previews, malware scanning, retention, permissions, signatures, OCR and storage abstraction.

name: Review, Rating & Reputation Engine
description: Verified reviews, ratings, reputation scores, moderation, abuse prevention, appeals and trust-signal publication.

name: Knowledge, CMS & Content Engine
description: Headless content, help center, policies, landing pages, localization, versioning, approvals and publication governance.

name: Workflow & Automation Engine
description: Event-triggered workflows, stateful automations, approvals, timers, escalations, human tasks, retries and no-code policy-driven orchestration.

name: Analytics, Reporting & BI Engine
description: Metrics, dashboards, funnels, cohorts, exports, scheduled reports, semantic layer, data governance and KPI definitions.

name: Integration & API Gateway Engine
description: Public/private APIs, webhooks, partner integrations, provider abstraction, credentials, throttling, idempotency and contract governance.

name: Platform Configuration & Feature Flag Engine
description: Tenant-aware configuration, feature flags, rollout, experiments, kill-switches, overrides, approvals and config audit.

name: AI & Recommendation Engine
description: Recommendations, ranking, predictions, AI-assisted workflows, model governance, explainability, safety, evaluation and human override.

name: Subscription, Plans & Licensing Engine
description: Plans, quotas, entitlements, usage metering, billing integration, upgrades, downgrades, trials and license governance.

name: Background Jobs & Scheduler Engine
description: Queues, workers, delayed jobs, cron, retries, dead-letter queues, priority, distributed execution and operational safety.

name: Observability, Monitoring & Health Engine
description: Logs, metrics, traces, health checks, alerts, incidents, SLOs, runbooks, audits and operational telemetry.

name: Internationalization & Localization Engine
description: Languages, regions, currencies, timezones, calendars, formatting, translations, locale rules and regional compliance.

name: Platform Kernel, Shared Contracts & Cross-Module Architecture
description: Shared kernel, canonical identifiers, global types, naming conventions, dependency rules, CES/CCS compatibility, cross-module contracts, error codes, versioning, ADRs and freeze governance.
